hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(pro|pri)$'; then echo '⚠️ .pro/.pri changed — full qmake regeneration required (run: qmake6 <pro> && make). make alone will NOT pick up new/removed files or changed LIBS.'; elif [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(cpp|h)$'; then cd /home/johe2/optiflow5 && make -j4 -q 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '⚠️ Source changed — incremental rebuild needed (run: make -j4)'; fi; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '/(moc|objects|rcc)/|/Makefile$|/Makefile\.(Debug|Release)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: This is a qmake-generated file. Edit the .pro/.pri source files instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
cd /home/johe2/optiflow5 && if [ -d .beads ]; then bd sync 2>&1 | tail -3; fi
